description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits a dependency OBJECT immediately after the requested root OBJECT but before a WANT requests that dependency.

assertions.description: Reader rejects OBJECT because the dependency object arrived before any WANT requested it.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the unrequested dependency OBJECT violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a post-root pending-request negative interop case for dependency objects.
The seed still uses the normal peer-store transcript generator, but the harness moves the dependency OBJECT to immediately follow the root OBJECT.
